workers_launched.task: Check commit trailer in agent docs

summary: The exact Copilot co-author trailer is present in the worker agent commit template, but not explicitly present in commander, merger, or skill merge/commit instructions. No malformed variants were found.

findings.details: Worker agent commits on isolated stampede/TASK_ID branches and includes the exact required trailer in its git commit template.
Commander instructions say to commit with the required Copilot co-author trailer, but do not spell out the exact required trailer string.
Merger commit example lacks the Copilot co-author trailer. This is a gap if merger commits must carry the same trailer.
Skill merge/auto-merge instructions contain no Co-authored-by trailer requirement; merge command uses only 'Merge $branch'.
One exact trailer occurrence was found and no malformed Copilot co-author trailer variants were identified.

recommendations: Add the literal required trailer to agents/stampede-commander.agent.md where it references the required Copilot co-author trailer.
If merger and skill-generated merge commits are expected to include the trailer, update agents/stampede-merger.agent.md and skills/SKILL.md commit examples/instructions accordingly.
